name: TMP
description: Vladof's TMP is a straightforward machine pistol with middling accuracy, low kick, a respectable magazine and quick reloads. Higher grade versions can maintain strong sustained DPS, particularly compared with most non-Vladof pistols. It can roll with different barrels: Tediore (no extra effect), Maliwan (better accuracy and stronger elemental damage when elemental), Dahl (faster recoil recovery with lower damage), and Bandit or Scav (higher damage but worse accuracy).
notes: Drops at random from any appropriate loot source.
